privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Moodle LMS instance with the pre-loaded BIO101 course (Introduction to Biology) created during environment setup. The expected database activity structure references real pharmaceutical data: Amoxicillin is a legitimate aminopenicillin antibiotic used for bacterial infections (ear infections, pneumonia, UTIs) with documented side effects (nausea, diarrhea, skin rash). The field type definitions (text, menu, textarea) and drug classification options (Analgesic, Antibiotic, Antihypertensive, Anticoagulant) are all standard Moodle Database types and legitimate pharmaceutical classifications.
